script:
set +e
echo '=== find claude binary ==='
find /home /usr/local /opt /root -maxdepth 6 -name claude -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20
find /home /usr/local /opt /root -maxdepth 6 -name claude -type l 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo '=== which claude as azureuser via login shell ==='
sudo -u azureuser -i bash -c 'which claude; echo PATH=$PATH' 2>&1 | head -10
echo '=== which claude as azureuser non-login ==='
sudo -u azureuser bash -c 'which claude; echo PATH=$PATH' 2>&1 | head -10
echo '=== claude reference in mskai-responder (args list build) ==='
grep -n -B2 -A2 'claude' /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -60
echo '=== systemd unit exec line + env for mskai-responder ==='
systemctl cat mskai-responder.service 2>/dev/null | head -40
echo '=== mskai responder err log discovery ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/ 2>/dev/null
echo '===END==='
